SourceProxy.name: ComputeGeodeticCoordinates
SourceProxy.label: Compute Geodetic Coordinates

Documentation.short_help: Append geodetic coordinates (Longitude, Latitude, Altitude) to points.
Documentation.long_help: Projects input XYZ coordinates from InputCRS to OutputCRS using PROJ and appends three arrays: Longitude (deg), Latitude (deg), Altitude (m). Mirrors behavior of Temporal Transforms Writer when projection is enabled.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Projects input XYZ coordinates from InputCRS to OutputCRS using PROJ and appends three arrays: Longitude (deg), Latitude (deg), Altitude (m).

InputProperty.name: Input
InputProperty.Documentation: PolyData containing points (XYZ in InputCRS) for geodetic computation.

StringVectorProperty.name: InputCRS
StringVectorProperty.label: Source CRS of XYZ
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Coordinate reference system of the input positions X,Y,Z. Examples: EPSG:4978 (ECEF), EPSG:32631 (UTM 31N), EPSG:3857 (used for rendering maps in Google Maps, OpenStreetMap).

StringVectorProperty.name: OutputCRS
StringVectorProperty.label: Target CRS for LLA
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Coordinate reference system used to compute geographic coordiates (Longitude/Latitude/Altitude). The computed altitude corresponds to an ellipsoidal height, unless the target CRS explicitly includes a vertical datum. Examples: EPSG:4979 (WGS84 geographic 3D with ellipsoidal height), EPSG:4326 (WGS84 lon/lat, degrees).
